mapper.select:
select count(*) from ghp
GHP_USAGE = 'Y'
AND GHP_CATEGORY = #{ghpCategorySearch}
AND ( UPPER(GHP_ID) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(GHP_NAME) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(GHP_CATEGORY) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(GHP_STANDARD) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') )

SELECT G.GHP_ID AS ghpId, G.GHP_NAME AS ghpName, G.GHP_CATEGORY AS ghpCategory, G.GHP_STANDARD AS ghpStandard, G.GHP_CHECK_METHOD AS ghpCheckMethod, G.GHP_CYCLE AS ghpCycle, NVL(G.GHP_WH_TYPE, 0) AS ghpWhType, NVL(G.GHP_WP_TYPE, 0) AS ghpWpType, WP.WP_TYPE_NAME AS wpTypeName, G.GHP_MIN_VALUE AS ghpMinValue, G.GHP_MAX_VALUE AS ghpMaxValue, G.GHP_UNIT AS ghpUnit, G.GHP_USAGE AS ghpUsage FROM GHP G LEFT JOIN WP_TYPE WP ON G.GHP_WP_TYPE = WP.WP_TYPE_NO WHERE G.GHP_ID = #{ghpId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO GHP ( GHP_ID, GHP_NAME, GHP_CATEGORY, GHP_STANDARD, GHP_CHECK_METHOD, GHP_CYCLE, GHP_WH_TYPE, GHP_WP_TYPE, GHP_MIN_VALUE, GHP_MAX_VALUE, GHP_UNIT, GHP_USAGE ) VALUES ( 'GHP' || GHP_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{ghpName}, #{ghpCategory}, #{ghpStandard}, #{ghpCheckMethod}, #{ghpCycle}, CASE WHEN #{ghpWhType} = 0 THEN NULL ELSE #{ghpWhType} END, CASE WHEN #{ghpWpType} = 0 THEN NULL ELSE #{ghpWpType} END, #{ghpMinValue}, #{ghpMaxValue}, #{ghpUnit}, 'Y' )
mapper.update: UPDATE GHP SET GHP_NAME = #{ghpName}, GHP_CATEGORY = #{ghpCategory}, GHP_STANDARD = #{ghpStandard}, GHP_CHECK_METHOD = #{ghpCheckMethod}, GHP_CYCLE = #{ghpCycle}, GHP_WH_TYPE = CASE WHEN #{ghpWhType} = 0 THEN NULL ELSE #{ghpWhType} END, GHP_WP_TYPE = CASE WHEN #{ghpWpType} = 0 THEN NULL ELSE #{ghpWpType} END, GHP_MIN_VALUE = #{ghpMinValue}, GHP_MAX_VALUE = #{ghpMaxValue}, GHP_UNIT = #{ghpUnit} WHERE GHP_ID = #{ghpId}
